voice: Our tone is warm and inviting, embodying the timeless hospitality of a countryside inn. We speak with a quietly premium British sensibility, never flashy or overly modern.
logo_style_brief: The logo should be an engraved heraldic pub crest, featuring a St George cross shield, oak leaves, and a small crown. Arched lettering should surround the crest, presented in dark green and gold on a cream background.
photo_style_tokens: honey-stone English coaching inn, warm amber interior light, dark oak and brass, editorial pub photography

facts_from_brief.future_editable_requirement: Design should be easy to update in future. menus must be easy to re-price without redesign.

invented: Specific names for palette colors (Parchment Cream, Forest Green, Ink Black, Subtle Gold)
